title: MRP v0 — Capture dual-output payload
description: Returned by the harness adapter when a capture event fires (session.end, compact.triggered, clear.triggered). Both fields land: raw for future re-processing, drafts for immediate use.

raw_exhaust.description: Unprocessed session context (transcript, summary, or raw dump). Non-empty string required.

classified_drafts.description: Harness's inline attempt at structured memory drafts. May be empty if harness does not support inline classification.

confidence.description: How confident the harness is in this classification
